title: World Urban Forum backs 'Baku Call to Action' on global housing crisis
connection: Over 57,000 people from 176 countries gathered in Baku this week to declare housing a human right, not a market commodity. The forum connects directly to Rural and Urban Places - the idea that rapid urbanisation, inequality and climate change are inseparable problems that cities must solve together.

title: Building the smart city: Promise, pitfalls and the people at its heart
connection: Shanghai's AI-powered metro, Moscow's city-wide digital twin, flood-proof parks that absorb 15,000 cubic metres of rainwater a day - cities are transforming fast. But experts are asking: who actually benefits? This sits squarely in Rural and Urban Places and raises questions about technology, equity and what a city is actually for.

title: The Sounds of adventure: Exploring NZ's Queen Charlotte Track
connection: The Marlborough Sounds in New Zealand's South Island - a place so isolated that boats are the only way in, yet now drawing 35,000 visitors a year to hike, bike and kayak. A real-world example of how tourism transforms remote places, and what sustainable access to natural environments can look like. Connects to Australia's Neighbours and Rural and Urban Places.
